column1: I'm just dying to get away!
I can't wait to get away from here...
Get Away With It? I think I'm in the right place.
It's been so hard to get away from work...
Get away from me! Oh no not you it's a fly buzzing around.
I can't remember my last getaway...
Everyone promises a getaway but not everyone can deliver.
Everyone loves a Jet2holiday... let's get away!
Can you help me get away from all the noise of the city?
Are you the getaway driver? Just kidding! You must get that all the time...
I'm surprised my boss let me get away from my desk ha ha ha.
Ooh if you were travelling with me I wouldn't let you get away...
